name: Sky plc
description: Sky Group Limited, trading as Sky, is a prominent British media and telecommunications conglomerate. Headquartered in Isleworth, London, the company provides a wide range of services including television broadcasting, broadband internet, and mobile telephony. Originally a public company listed on the London Stock Exchange, Sky was acquired by Comcast in 2018 and now operates as a division of the American multinational. The company maintains extensive operations across several European countries, delivering entertainment and connectivity solutions to millions of customers through its diverse portfolio of content and technology platforms.
